---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Maryville College --- Visiting Lecturer

| Course | Term |
|---|---|
| ECN 210 Principles of Economics | Spring 2025 |
| ECN 332-01 & ECN 332-02 Money & Banking | Spring 2025 |
| STA 120 Introductory Statistics | Summer 2025 |

---

## Middle Tennessee State University --- Instructor

| Course | Term | Evaluation |
|---|---|---|
| ECON 2410 Principles of Macroeconomics | Fall 2023 | 3.98 / 5.0 (25 students) |
| ECON 2410 Principles of Macroeconomics | Spring 2024 | 4.05 / 5.0 (43 students) |
| ECON 2420 Principles of Microeconomics | Fall 2024 | |

---

## Troy University --- Graduate Teaching Assistant

| Course | Term |
|---|---|
| ECON 4451 Economics of Globalization | Spring 2021 |
| ECON 2252 Principles of Microeconomics | Fall 2019, Fall 2020 |
